title: What They Don't Talk About When They Talk About Love
original_title: Yang Tidak Dibicarakan Ketika Membicarakan Cinta
overview: As pupils at a school for the visually impaired, best friends Diana and Fitri are living full and complicated lives in spite of their sensory limits.
